description: Basic size and shape that of Mallard. Body quite dark brown, contrasting sharply with paler tan head and neck. Dark brown eyeline and crown. Tail brown. Undertail coverts dark brown, without sign of being paler as is often case in Mexi x Mallard hybrids. No upcurled tail feathers. Bill olive with some yellow tinge. Internal markings on scaps and upper tail coverts. Narrow white border to blue-ish speculumBehavior: Loafing, then swimming off, in company of MallardsCall: Not heardPlumage: adult
